seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Moffat Beach and Moffatdale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Moffat Beach vs Moffatdale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moffat Beach and Moffatdale.
heading: Moffat Beach vs Moffatdale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moffat Beach, Queensland and Moffatdale, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moffatdale has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Moffat Beach (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moffat Beach or Moffatdale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moffat Beach has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Moffatdale scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moffat Beach scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Moffatdale scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moffat Beach or Moffatdale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moffatdale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
